content.content:
{"body":"

should
protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum
be part_of "vesicle-mediated transport"?

(occurs via COPII vesicles?)","comments":[{"id":"MDEyOklzc3VlQ29tbWVudDYwMzA5MzkzNA==","author":{"login":"ValWood"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@pgaudet  discuss/add today","createdAt":"2020-03-24T08:17:16Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":true,"minimizedReason":"outdated","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-603093934","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"MDEyOklzc3VlQ29tbWVudDYwMzM1MjY3MQ==","author":{"login":"pgaudet"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@ValWood to check her annotations","createdAt":"2020-03-24T16:35:59Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-603352671","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"MDEyOklzc3VlQ29tbWVudDYwNTYzNDEwOQ==","author":{"login":"ValWood"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"The  term "protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum" should be obsoleted.

It is used for 3 unrelated processes.
It has a child
GO:0030970   retrograde protein transport, ER to cytosol
The directed movement of unfolded or misfolded proteins from the endoplasmic reticulum to the cytosol through the translocon. PMID:11994744

This, term and annotations to it, are fine.

Quite a lot of the other annotation to   "protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum"  are for  
some are retrograde (move to the existing child )

Others are for
1) transmembrane transport of small molecules from ER to cytosol
e..g
human TM9SF4 | Transmembrane 9 superfamily member 4
human TMED9 
mouse Slc51b. pthr36129

2) some are  trafficking from the ER via COPII vesicles
e.g 
TLG2 | Syntaxin-like t-SNARE

Part of the problem is that there isn't a term to describe this process, as a child of
vesicle-mediated transport
https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/GTerm?id=GO:0016192
so people are finding the term in the other branch which does not reference v-m-t at all

we have a term for the component:
GO:0030134    COPII-coated ER to Golgi transport vesicle

but not for the process
~ER to Golgi vesicle transport~ not required


","createdAt":"2020-03-29T13:16:22Z","includesCreatedEdit":true,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-605634109","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws7dGh1a","author":{"login":"pgaudet"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Al those terms should be obsoleted
 
- GO:0032527 protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum
-  [GO:0070862 negative regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070862#display-lineage-tab)
- [GO:0070863 positive regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070863#display-lineage-tab)
- [GO:0070861 regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070861#display-lineage-tab)
- GO:1904211 membrane protein proteolysis involved in retrograde protein transport


and the relation of [capable_of part of] [GO:1990530 Cdc50p-Drs2p complex](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:1990530#display-lineage-tab) should be changed (to capable_of part of] GO:0032527 protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum ?? to be confirmed). ","createdAt":"2026-01-05T08:51:35Z","includesCreatedEdit":true,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-3709476186","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws7dGqHq","author":{"login":"pgaudet"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Annotation review is here: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6172

67 EXP annotations (including extensions). 

","createdAt":"2026-01-05T09:02:13Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-3709510122","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws7dGwQF","author":{"login":"ValWood"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"For curators:
COPII-coated vesicle budding (GO:0090114)
It is usually a good replacement for the forward direction in ER to Golgi transport, as it's the COPII vesicle  that causes the exit from the ER.","createdAt":"2026-01-05T09:09:39Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-3709535237","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws7db0r6","author":{"login":"ValWood"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Could 

[GO:0070973](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0070973)    protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site
also be obsoleted?
it says nothing about the process and any annotations can be moved to the appropriate process terms.","createdAt":"2026-01-06T15:07:31Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-3715058426","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABDGcWGg","author":{"login":"raymond91125"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"> Could
> 
> [GO:0070973](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0070973) protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site also be obsoleted? it says nothing about the process and any annotations can be moved to the appropriate process terms.

Which process terms, could you elaborate, @ValWood? Thanks.","createdAt":"2026-05-20T22:11:26Z","includesCreatedEdit":true,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-4503049754","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABDIhJww","author":{"login":"ValWood"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Hi Raymond, 

As with  "protein exit from..."
It's an unnecessary term, (conflates multiple processes)


10 EXP
O15027 SEC16A	UniProt.     => GO:0048208 | COPII vesicle coat assembly
P34643 sec-16A.1	WB.     =>  GO:0048208 | COPII vesicle coat assembly
P48415 SEC16	SGD.         =>     GO:0048208 | COPII vesicle coat assembly
Q57WC1 Tb03.28C22.610	GeneDB   =>  delete, already has endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport
Q5JRA6 MIA3	UniProt   => [endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport]
Q5S006 Lrrk2	UniProt   => delete, already has "regulation of ER to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport" from the same paper
Q5S007 LRRK2	UniProt   =>  "regulation of ER to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport"
Q61334 Bcap29	MGI.       =>  This is something to do with ER quality control probably GO:0034976  
response to endoplasmic reticulum stress or a descendant
Q61335 Bcap31	MGI.       =>   This is something to do with ER quality control
Q92538 GBF1	UniProt.   =>   vesicle-mediated transport or a descendant


 We can't do replaced by because it is used in different contexts (pathways)

","createdAt":"2026-05-21T05:59:13Z","includesCreatedEdit":true,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"THUMBS_UP","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-4505225667","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABEP2gcw","author":{"login":"raymond91125"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@dragon-ai-agent please draft an email announcement for obsoletion based on this template: https://github.com/geneontology/go-announcements/blob/master/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/obsoletion-notice.md. Make sure unnecessary texts are removed and no additional cross references need to be taken care of other than those in the annotation review tickets:
https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6434
https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6172","createdAt":"2026-05-29T21:30:25Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"EYES","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-4580024435","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABEP2o5Q","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/26663193081)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*","createdAt":"2026-05-29T21:30:46Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-4580026597","viewerDidAuthor":true}],"title":"obsoletion  "protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum""}

content.content:
---
name: Obsoletion notice
about: This template is to notify ontology users of a term obsoletion.
title: 'Obsoletion notice: [GO ID: term label]'
labels: obsoletion
assignees: ''

---

Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete [GO ID: term label]. 
(keep one, remove others): 

* The reason for obsoletion is that the term is not clearly defined and usage has been inconsistent
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the meaning of the term is ambiguous.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a GO-CAM model.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represent an assay and not a real GO process. 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this represents a phenotype.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using [appropriate GO term] 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term refers to a class of proteins.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was added in error.
* The reason for obsoletion is that more specific terms were created.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was an unnecessary grouping term.
* The reason for obsoletion is that is not known to be catalyzed by any gene product.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that it more specific than the specificity of any known gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that there is no evidence that this function/process/component exists.
* (or add other reason)

Annotations:
There are X experimental annotations to this term by (list of impacted groups and their respective numbers of EXP and ISS annotations). 
or: There are no experimental annotations to this term.

There are X InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to this term. 
or: There are no mappings to this term.

This term is included in the XXX subset(s).
or: This term is not present in any subset.

Annotations can be viewed here: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-annotation tracker].

If obsolete term has a 'replaced by' term: (optional)
This term is being replaced by [GO term] 

If obsolete term has a 'consider' term:  (optional)
Annotations can be transferred to [suggested GO term(s)] 

Any comments can be  added to the issue: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-ontology tracker]. 
Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks, 

The GO-Ontology Editors

content.content:
{"body":"Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete [GO:0070973](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0070973) protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site
see https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122

Experimental annotations that need to be reviewed are here: 
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Dc-DTgrPEsAhrVSwClsvIoNTtrnxRGkxhExWGNDNnW0

Impacted groups: 
GeneDB 1
MGI 2
~SGD 1~
WB 1
~UniProt 7~

** Group contacts: https://github.com/geneontology/go-site/blob/master/metadata/group-contacts.csv
----

Mappings that need to be reviewed: (InterPro2GO, UniProt-Keywords, UniRule) 
GO:0070973	unirule2go	UniRule:UR001349783 > protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site



Thanks.
","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDOAlzhG88AAAABD27Ekg","author":{"login":"Antonialock"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"uniprot done","createdAt":"2026-05-27T10:56:06Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6434#issuecomment-4553884818","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAlzhG88AAAABEDbCKQ","author":{"login":"LiNiMGI"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"MGI done.","createdAt":"2026-05-28T18:17:52Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6434#issuecomment-4566991401","viewerDidAuthor":false}],"title":"Review annotations to GO:0070973 protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site"}

content.content:
{"body":"Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete 
GO:0032527 protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum
[GO:0070862 negative regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070862#display-lineage-tab)
[GO:0070863 positive regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070863#display-lineage-tab)
[GO:0070861 regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070861#display-lineage-tab)

content.text: I have all the context I need. Let me draft the obsoletion notice and post it on the issue.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/obsoletion-notice.md << 'EOF'
## Draft email announcement for obsoletion

Based on the [obsoletion notice template](https://github.com/geneontology/go-announcements/blob/master/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/obsoletion-notice.md), drawing on the annotation review tickets [go-annotation#6172](https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6172) and [go-annotation#6434](https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6434).

---

**Title:** Obsoletion notice: protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum and related terms

Dear all,

The proposal has been made to obsolete the following terms:

- [GO:0032527 protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0032527)
- [GO:0070861 regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070861)
- [GO:0070862 negative regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070862)
- [GO:0070863 positive regulation of protein exit from endoplasmic reticulum](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070863)
- [GO:1904211 membrane protein proteolysis involved in retrograde protein transport](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:1904211)
- [GO:0070973 protein localization to endoplasmic reticulum exit site](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0070973)

The reason for obsoletion is that the meaning of these terms is ambiguous: they conflate multiple distinct processes (retrograde transport from ER to cytosol, transmembrane transport of small molecules, and COPII-vesicle-mediated trafficking), and curators have used them inconsistently for unrelated mechanisms.

**Annotations:**
Experimental annotations to these terms have been reviewed in the following tickets:
- GO:0032527 and regulation children: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6172
- GO:0070973: https://github.com/geneontology/go-annotation/issues/6434

**Mappings:**
One UniRule mapping (UniRule:UR001349783 → GO:0070973) is being addressed in the annotation review tickets. No other InterPro2GO, UniProt-Keywords, or UniRule mappings are affected.

**Suggested replacements** (case-by-case; no automatic `replaced_by` because usage is heterogeneous):
- For COPII-vesicle-mediated forward transport from the ER: [GO:0090114 COPII-coated vesicle budding](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0090114) or [GO:0006888 endoplasmic reticulum to Golgi vesicle-mediated transport](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0006888)
- For COPII vesicle coat assembly: [GO:0048208 COPII vesicle coat assembly](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0048208)
- For retrograde transport of misfolded proteins from ER to cytosol: [GO:0030970 retrograde protein transport, ER to cytosol](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0030970)
- For ER quality control / stress response: [GO:0034976 response to endoplasmic reticulum stress](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/term/GO:0034976) or a descendant

Any comments can be added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122

Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks,

The GO-Ontology Editors

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/26663193081)
EOF
gh issue comment 19122 --repo geneontology/go-ontology --body-file /tmp/obsoletion-notice.md
input.description: Post the drafted obsoletion notice as a comment on the issue

content.text:
Posted the draft on [issue #19122](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/19122#issuecomment-4580037943).

The draft consolidates all six terms slated for obsoletion (GO:0032527, GO:0070861, GO:0070862, GO:0070863, GO:1904211, GO:0070973), uses the "ambiguous" reason from the template (since the terms conflate multiple distinct processes), references the two annotation review tickets for the experimental annotations and the lone UniRule mapping, and lists curator-suggested replacement terms drawn from @ValWood's comments. The unused template options and placeholder lines have been removed; only `[DATE]` is left for @raymond91125 to fill in before sending.
